title: helichrysum × expansifolium
intro: Helichrysum × expansifolium, also known as the broad-leaved helichrysum, is a hybrid plant species within the sunflower family (Asteraceae) that is native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can help to soothe wounds and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Helichrysum × expansifolium include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of depression and anxiety disorders. This plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including essential oils, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
